name: omnistate
description: Persistent memory and cost optimizer system for Antigravity. Allows starting reduced sessions, taking textual snapshots of the work done, and optimizing the model via dedicated prompts.
author: Antigravity OS

skills.name: start-session
skills.description: Loads the reduced memory and open tasks at the beginning of the session to save context.

skills.name: snapshot-session
skills.description: Creates a snapshot of the current session, closes completed tasks, and updates the persistent memory.

skills.name: cost-setup
skills.description: Initializes the configuration for automatic cost routing.

skills.name: dashboard-omnistate
skills.description: Generates the visual dashboard for project metrics.
